feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Evangaline Buckley Begins
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,443Chapters: 23/24Kudos: 509

Summary: Evangaline Buckley has been alone for most of her life. She was unwanted by her parents and left by her sister when she had the first chance. For her most formative years, she had to go to extreme lengths just to get attention from those meant to care for her, failing more often than not.After finding out the truth about her creation, Evie decides that she has to do something – anything. She goes through even more pain and heartbreak before finding herself where she was always meant to end up. -+- This is both a prologue and season 1 rewrite.New chapter every Friday :)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: just hold me like we’re gonna be okay, will you?
entry.summary:
Author: thelikesofus

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 581Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: “I’m sorry,” the barely suppressed tremor in Eddie’s voice echoes the one in Buck’s hands as he clutches his cards. “What?’” Buck glances up, his brow pinching together for reasons other than his poorly dealt hand. “Eddie, no—,” “I should have known, Buck.” Eddie puts his own cards on the table. “I should have seen it.” 9x14 Coda

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Help Me
entry.summary:
Author: lucylou34

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 439Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: I was disappointed by who Buck went to first for Help. I always imagined it would be Eddie he went to, so this is my take on how I feel Buck should have reached out for help.

entry.title: you are like a sunset to me
entry.summary:
Author: BekahRose

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,753Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: In between one breath and the next, Eddie is standing in front of Buck with his hands cautiously curling around Buck's hips—while Buck was changing into a hospital gown in New Mexico, Eddie had seen the wide bruise that traveled from Buck's left hip to his right—and chases his gaze. "Hey, there's no right or wrong answer here, you're up for lapping the car and only the car, that's what we'll do. I just… I just wanted a change of scenery. Got sick of looking at rocks and fucking desert."  OR 10 hours is a helluva long time to drive when you're in pain, and suffering from a mild concussion. Factor in having to stop every 90 minutes to make sure you're getting out and stretching to ensure there's nothing happening where they can't see... Eddie decides that the best course of action is to pull over for the night so they can shower and rest.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Time in a bottle
entry.summary:
Author: DaniWib

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,286Chapters: 1/7Kudos: 7

Summary: After the failed intervention at Athena's house, Buck fled, his disbelief quickly swallowed by a rising tide of fury. Hen’s rant about no one caring echoed in his ears, each word piercing deep until his vision burned red. No one cared? No one? He had cared! He had tried to hold everyone together, checking in, reaching out, desperately trying to stop the 118 from falling apart. But they made it clear Buck's efforts weren’t wanted, weren’t needed, or in Hen’s case, didn’t even count. Just when Buck’s hurt and anger finally overflowed, he encountered someone with the power to change it all. A crossroads demon. [Fic is complete, chapters posted weekly Friday nights AEST]

entry.summary:

entry.title: relatively better
entry.summary:
Author: writedontfight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 974Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 40

Summary: The fire has almost burned itself to embers, a soft glow all that's left of the dancing flames. Eddie's face on the other side of the pit is still tinged with warm light, but it's slowly being replaced by a swath of shadow. Buck tries not to make it a metaphor.

entry.title: i'll never be the same
entry.summary:
Author: limbooo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,206Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 47

Summary: “Thanks for stopping by.” Because that's what polite people say and Buck is polite. He's being Buck. She doesn't say anything, just gives him a sideways sad smile. She walks over and wraps her arms around him, tight. For the first time since he got up, he feels his shoulders loosen as he wraps his arms around. He could wrap his arms around her two times over, but right now he feels like the small one. “I don't want to lose you too. You, Harry, Mom and the firehouse are all I have left of him. I refuse to lose another part of him. I refuse to lose you.” Everything is muffled but he thinks he hears a sniffle as her arms tighten around him. Her voice goes soft. “I love you, Buck. I need you around.”-just some may and buck siblingism with a side of buddie

entry.title: What a night to forget.
entry.summary:
Author: Absolute_Maniac

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,301Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 279

Summary: “Hey, can you see my phone anywhere?” he asked. Eddie started looking around the bed and then stretched himself to his side of the bed and pulled it from the nightstand.“Here.” He tossed it to him, and Buck immediately started looking through recent pictures on his phone. Pictures of them partying, a video of Eddie taking a shot, and another video of Eddie dancing.Then he came across the next picture and felt as if someone had thrown a bucket of ice water over his head. They must have asked someone else to take the picture because it was taken from at least a two-meter distance. The two of them were holding out a piece of paper towards the camera… and they were pressed together in a passionate kiss.Buck looked up from the picture when Eddie made a strangled sound on the other side of the room. “You might want to see this…” He reached over with a piece of paper in his hand. Buck took it and turned his phone over to him in return. Eddie bit into his fist as he studied the picture. Buck looked down at the paper in his hand and turned it over to the right side. It was a copy of a marriage license for Mr. Evan Buckley-Diaz and Mr. Edmundo Buckley-Diaz.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: without a single string
entry.summary:
Author: youbetsya

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,507Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 168

Summary: Eddie makes his way to one side of the table and Maddie sits down on the other side and they both sip their coffee in silence. They’ve never been alone in a room together. The thought hits Eddie like a flash-bang. How is that possible? They’ve known each other for almost a decade now. They share a person. Well, they share a lot of people, but especially one person. “He looks better today,” Maddie says, and Eddie is relieved. He feels sick when he thinks about Buck, but thinking about Buck is the only thing he feels capable of doing.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I’m Sick and Tired of Living in LA
entry.summary:
Author: glazedmercury

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,450Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 253

Summary: After the lawsuit, Buck comes back to work. Things don't go as well as he hoped, so he packs everything up and leaves. He winds up working as a firefighter at the newly reopened station 126 in Austin, Texas. When the 118 visit over a year later to help with wildfires, Buck is confronted by his past. Will he be open to reconciliation or will he leave them behind forever?

entry.title: Misery Scale
entry.summary:
Author: jupitcrs

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,017Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 226

Summary: He could fall asleep like this, maybe, leaning on Eddie. He's comfortable, slowly warming where they do touch, and he can even ignore the way his neck is going to get a cramp as long as neither of them move a muscle and nobody turns the big light on and the nausea doesn't surge up again and his head doesn't start splitting in two. Maybe he could get a half-hour's sleep in, even. A cat basking in the sun, Buck could shut his eyes and stay right here forever.or: Buck's withdrawal leaves him freezing. Eddie keeps him warm.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Minute That Wouldn’t End
entry.summary:
Author: lako

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,154Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 84

Summary: A deeply tired, ugly little part of Eddie wanted to know what would happen if he simply sat down on the apparatus floor and bled through his shirt. Would they notice then? Or would he have to actually pass out first? He hated that thought as soon as he had it. It wasn’t fair. They loved Buck because Buck was lovable, because he was family, because he had just been kidnapped and tortured and dragged through hell. Eddie loved him too. Maybe more than was good for him. Certainly more than was wise. And if Eddie had made himself harder to care for, then that wasn’t on them.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.summary:
Author: Diazstrdst (Aphrosephone118)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,805Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 83

Summary: "He and Eddie go back and forth for a second about trucks, something Buck REALLY wasn't even considering before this very moment, until the worst happens... Eddie finally looks round at him. Buck feels his stomach drop." OR my take on Buck's mind during 9x15 what a truly heartbreaking but incredibly impactful episode.

entry.title: bloodstains won't make it matter, got good things, got you
entry.summary:
Author: heroic_pants

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,350Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 89

Summary: “Go easy,” Eddie says, half without realising it, but Chris is gentle in hugging Buck and it’s Buck who is clearly trying to hold back.  “I thought you weren’t coming back,” Eddie hears, muffled, and wants to burst into tears.  “I told you I’d always come back for you, Chris.” Buck’s voice is scratchy and emotional.  Eddie has to look away, blinking at the ground. He can’t believe they’re finally home. They’re home and they’re together, the family.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:
Author: thisclose

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 620Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 32

Summary: spoilers for 9x15: Amid Buck’s recovery, Eddie tells Buck something he’s still scared to say: he’s in love with him.

entry.title: they're my friends, and they're in my bed
entry.summary:
Author: livelyvague

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,074Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 184

Summary: "No, no, no. Eddie please, don't do this to me," he begs. There's tears now flowing down his face, he's sure of it. He gets onto his knees, palms joined together. "Please, Eddie. It was, I don't know, fuck, it was a mistake, okay? I–I'm in so much pain still, okay? I'm in pain and–and the doctors don't care. They don't care that I wake up every day in pain, they just want to c-call me an addict. And I'm not, Eddie, please, please, Eddie—" "Stop," Eddie warns. "Buck, please stop talking. This. Fuck, this is bad, Buck. I–I have to report you." or, a 9x15 coda but also like if eddie found buck in the ambulance and no alarm went off

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley

entry.title: redemption lies plainly in truth
entry.summary:
Author: rainny_days

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,238Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 182

Summary: Buck tries to apologize to Eddie. Eddie tries to apologize to Buck. In the end, it's all just another word for love.

entry.title: Night is True (I Will Rescue You)
entry.summary:
Author: MysticCloud97

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 940Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 64

Summary: During the quiet of the night, Buck realises that he is loved and, for once, has a family. *Or a little blurb about Buck recovering from his withdrawal and finding that he is, in fact, very loved*
